---
title: "‘The Empress Elizabeth: A bit of true history.’"
---

## ‘The Empress Elizabeth: A bit of true history.’

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1900
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Friendly Leaves</i> (January 1900) 48-49.

### Notes

Signed C.M. Yonge.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
